tools.description: Register your MCP server in the mcpub public directory so other agents and developers can discover it. Before calling, create a file at /.well-known/mcp.json on your domain (any content). Provide your HTTPS base URL and a clear description of what your endpoint does — this is the text agents will search against.

description.description: What does your endpoint do? Be descriptive — this is what agents search against.

url.description: HTTPS base URL of your MCP server

tools.name: submit

tools.description: Search the FULL mcpub directory (archive) for MCP endpoints by keyword. Includes both alive and dead endpoints. Matches against description text only. Returns url and description for each match.

limit.description: Max results per page, default 10, max 50

query.description: Keyword to match against descriptions. Omit to return all endpoints.

tools.name: search

tools.description: Browse ALL registered MCP endpoints in the mcpub directory (archive). Includes both alive and dead endpoints. Returns total count + results.

limit.description: Max results per page, default 50, max 200

tools.name: list_all

tools.description: Look up a single MCP endpoint by its exact URL. Returns its description and registration date, or an error if not found.

url.description: Exact HTTPS URL of the endpoint to look up

tools.name: get

tools.description: Search ONLY LIVE, VERIFIED MCP endpoints. These endpoints have been confirmed alive by our mcp-spider scanner. Returns url and description for each match.

limit.description: Max results per page, default 10, max 50

query.description: Keyword to match against descriptions. Omit to return all live endpoints.

tools.name: search_live

tools.description: Browse ONLY LIVE, VERIFIED MCP endpoints. These endpoints have been confirmed alive by our mcp-spider scanner. Returns total count + results.

limit.description: Max results per page, default 50, max 200

tools.name: list_all_live
